title: Velvety Turkish Mozzarella Bruschetta
description: A rich and velvety Turkish dish featuring fresh mozzarella, served as a brunch-friendly snack with a touch of Indian-inspired tadka for a unique twist.

ingredients.name: 200g Turkish Mozzarella
ingredients.notes: Feta or ricotta can be used as a substitute.

instructions: In a blender, combine the heavy cream and lime juice. Blend until smooth.
Add salt to taste and blend for another 30 seconds or so.
Gently fold in the mozzarella using a spatula into the creamy mixture until well combined.
Preheat your broiler if you have one; otherwise, place slices of bread on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle some of the chopped basil leaves and fresh parsley over each slice of bread.
Pour the cheese mixture evenly over each slice. Place under the broiler for 2-3 minutes until the top is slightly golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let it rest for a couple of minutes to allow the cheese to firm up slightly.
Serve warm with additional basil leaves and parsley sprigs.
